title: Verify Explanation Slide Opacity Reflects Global Card Opacity
description: Check that the Explanation Slide background layer respects the global cardOpacity settings without affecting text visibility, ensuring text remains fully visible while background opacity changes.

steps.description: Open SmartBoard with an Explanation Slide
Set global cardOpacity to 50%
Verify Explanation Slide background opacity is 50%
Set card background to 'Transparent'
Verify Explanation Slide background is fully transparent (no fallback dark color)
Verify Explanation Slide text opacity remains 100% and text is fully visible

title: Verify Option Button Background and Border Respect cardOpacity Setting
description: Ensure that the Option Button's background and border colors correctly respond to the global cardOpacity value set in the useBoardStore, affecting their transparency as expected.

steps.description: Navigate to a question card with option buttons
Adjust global cardOpacity to 70%
Confirm that option buttons background and borders are rendered with 70% opacity

title: Verify Compact Explanation Header Layout
description: Verify that the Explanation Slide header has updated padding and font size to be more compact, maximizing visible content area without clipping or overlapping elements.

steps.description: Open an Explanation Slide card
Check that the header padding is smaller than previous design baseline
Verify font size of the header text is smaller as per updated specs
Confirm content area below the header is expanded compared to prior design

title: Verify Explanation Slide Toggle Button Moved to BoardToolbar
description: Ensure the toggle button for showing/hiding the Explanation Slide is now accessible only through the BoardToolbar and no longer present inside individual Question Cards.

steps.description: Navigate to a SmartBoard containing Question Cards
Verify that Explanation Slide toggle button is present in the BoardToolbar component
Confirm that Explanation Slide toggle button is not found inside any Question Card
Click the Explanation Slide toggle button in BoardToolbar
Verify Explanation Slide visibility toggles on/off accordingly

title: Verify cardOpacity and textOpacity Configuration via StyleToolbar
description: Test the ability to configure cardOpacity and textOpacity from the StyleToolbar and validate that changes apply correctly to question cards and text elements on the board.

steps.description: Open StyleToolbar on SmartBoard
Adjust cardOpacity setting to 60%
Confirm Question Cards backgrounds reflect 60% opacity
Adjust textOpacity setting to 80%
Verify text within Question Cards renders with 80% opacity

title: Verify Opacity Settings Persist Across Board Sessions
description: Validate that cardOpacity and textOpacity settings remain consistent after saving and reloading the SmartBoard session.

steps.description: Set cardOpacity to 40% and textOpacity to 90% via StyleToolbar
Save the current board session
Reload the board session
Verify cardOpacity remains at 40%
Verify textOpacity remains at 90%

title: Verify Opacity Changes Gracefully Handle Invalid Inputs
description: Check that providing invalid values for cardOpacity and textOpacity in StyleToolbar input are properly handled with validation errors or fallback to defaults.

steps.description: Attempt to set cardOpacity to a negative value (-10%)
Verify input is rejected and user is shown validation error or value resets to minimum allowed
Attempt to set textOpacity above 100% (e.g. 120%)
Confirm input is rejected and set to maximum allowed (100%) or error message displayed
Enter non-numeric values (e.g. 'abc') for opacity settings
Verify invalid input is handled gracefully with error and no crash

title: Verify Opacity Settings Are Consistent Between Components
description: Ensure that cardOpacity changes in store propagate to all affected components like Explanation Slide background, Option Button backgrounds, and BoardToolbar toggles consistently and without delay.

steps.description: Set cardOpacity to 75% in useBoardStore
Verify Explanation Slide background opacity is 75%
Verify Option Buttons backgrounds and borders opacity are 75%
Verify no component shows mismatched opacity values

title: Verify Drag Performance and Smoothness
description: Confirm that dragging the Explanation Slide is smooth and follows the cursor 1:1 without lag or 'floaty' behavior caused by CSS transitions.

steps.description: Start dragging the Explanation Slide rapidly
Verify the card position updates instantly with the cursor
Check that there is no 'catch-up' animation effect when stopping the drag
